top_signals.title: Hungary Names OTP’s Tardos as Debt Chief in Charge of Cost Cuts
top_signals.summary: Hungary appointed Gergely Tardos, head of the research at OTP Bank Nyrt., as chief executive of the government’s Debt Management Agency, Finance Minister Andras Karman said Sunday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
